title: Constituencies that flipped from Fidesz to Tisza (2022→2026)

summary.note: EM (2022 opposition alliance) dissolved; Tisza absorbed most of its electorate plus converted Fidesz voters

budapest.note: Districts where Fidesz won in 2022, now Tisza

rural.note: The decisive battleground — rural Fidesz bastions fell

key_finding: 74 Fidesz constituencies flipped to Tisza. ~41 of these were rural districts, representing 55% of all flips. This demonstrates that Tisza's supermajority was built on rural penetration, not just urban dominance.
